'''鈭歝h-r-h-b''' ('''kacharheboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maggot|maggot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-r-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maggot|maggot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-r-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| kacharheboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thicharheboko|thicharheboko]] || [[word:jicharheboko|jicharheboko]] || [[word:shicharheboko|shicharheboko]] || [[word:kicharheboko|kicharheboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
